title: MedCraft
description: A custom model driven craftable healing items plugin
body:
-------------------------------------------------------</br>
All information on page is subject to change at anytime without notice</br>
</br>
</br>
need help?</br>
You can use github issues</br>
or</br>
join my discord server: https://discord.gg/gJkMwN63MU</br>
</br>
MedCraft</br>
Realistic Bandages and MedKits!​</br>
​</br>
MedCraft is a plugin for adding Realistic Healing Items to MineCraft</br>
</br>
current default items are small medkits, MedKits, small bandages and Bandages, more to come</br>
</br>
<details>
<summary>Implemented Features​
</summary>
- Right/Left Click while holding a healing item in main hand to heal yourself​</br>
- Right Click another player with a non-ranged healing item in your offhand to heal them​</br>
- Right/Left Click ranged healing item to heal yourself & everyone within the configured range that needs it</br>
<set ranged: true on items you want to be ranged >​</br>
- Medical items give highly configurable regeneration effects​</br>
- All messages are configurable in the config.yml​</br>
- You set a Player or Console command that runs after a player uses an item on a per-item bases in the config.yml​</br>
- Configurable per-item recipe!!</br>
  - Both Shape and items</br>
  - can set Craftable: false per item to disable crafting!​</br>
- warm-ups before item is used</br>
- You can set Warmup-speed from 1 to 60</br>
1 = slowest</br>
60 = instant​</br>
- No dependencies, except of course the server itself :p​</br>
- CAN BE GIVEN IN KITS:</br>
any item as set in the config, paper by default, with the correct CustomModelData will be considered a healing item respectively​</br>
- Can be given using anything that can apply the CustomModelData to the correct item (paper by default with 16,17,18 or 19 as CustomModelData for the default items)​</br>
- add your own items to the config</br>
</details>

Commands</br>
none</br>
......</br>
And on to permissions!!​</br>

Permissions
med.craft.use.offhand</br>
Grants player the ability to use offhand mechanic to heal others</br>
</br>
med.craft.use</br>
Grants player the ability to use a MedCraft item</br>
</br>
med.craft</br>
Grants player the ability to craft a MedCraft item</br>
</br>
</br>
Configuration</br>
[https://github.com/xsmeths/MedCraft/blob/master/src/main/resources/config.yml](https://github.com/xsmeths/MedCraft/blob/master/src/main/resources/config.yml)
